summary: Iter69 PWA + Mobile/Responsive validation. All PWA assets serve correctly (manifest, sw.js, offline.html, 5 icons — proper content-types). index.html contains all required PWA meta tags (manifest link, theme-color #0F056B, apple-mobile-web-app-capable=yes, apple-touch-icon, viewport-fit=cover). Mobile responsive: 0 horizontal overflow on /feed /chat /services /wallet /profile across 4 viewports (320/360/375/414). Bottom nav visible on every page. iOS anti-zoom: 6/6 form inputs on /login have computed font-size >= 16px. Services → JAPAP Staking tile + japap-staking-view + 3 plan cards (3m/6m/12m) all visible on mobile. Sidebar 'nav-crypto' entry confirmed REMOVED. InstallPWA Android: synthetic beforeinstallprompt → banner + CTA + dismiss all render correctly. InstallPWA iOS: with iPhone UA override, sheet appears after 4.5s grace with all 3 numbered steps (Partager / écran d'accueil / Prêt) and ios-dismiss button. Admin /admin at 375px: 15 tabs render, no overflow, staking-admin-tab mounts. Backend regression: 37/37 pass (8 staking + 22 messaging center + 7 individual targeting).

ui_bugs.issue: After clicking pwa-install-dismiss the banner element was still queryable ~800ms later in one Playwright run (banner_hidden_after_dismiss=False). State should set showAndroid=false on dismiss; functionally the snooze is persisted to localStorage. Possibly a render timing artifact — worth a manual re-check that dismiss cleanly unmounts the banner.

action_items: (LOW) Verify InstallPWA Android dismiss cleanly removes the banner from DOM — possibly add an explicit unmount check or animate-out; current implementation should work via setShowAndroid(false). Snooze is persisted correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: InstallPWA.jsx: iOS detection relies on userAgent + maxTouchPoints — works in tests. Snooze key uses localStorage which is per-origin → fine.
manifest.json: 3 icons including purpose=maskable as required ✅. Shortcuts (chat/wallet/services) defined for Android long-press menu — nice-to-have.
index.html: posthog inline init script is large and runs on every load — consider deferring on slow mobile networks.
sw.js + offline.html served correctly even though SW registration is gated to NODE_ENV=production (per agent context). Confirmed in /app/frontend/src/index.js.

success_rate.frontend: 100% on critical PWA + responsive checks (1 LOW timing observation on Android dismiss)

context_for_next_testing_agent: PWA pass solid. SW registration only fires in NODE_ENV=production (preview is dev mode) — that's expected; the asset (/sw.js) itself is served. For InstallPWA iOS testing, override navigator.userAgent + navigator.maxTouchPoints in an init script BEFORE navigation, then wait >=4.5s for the sheet. For Android, dispatch a synthetic Event named 'beforeinstallprompt' with userChoice + prompt() shims. messaging_real_send_enabled remains 'false'. Use `-p no:pytest_ethereum` and `RATE_LIMIT_ENABLED=false` for backend regressions.
rca of the issue: N/A — no blocking issue. The single LOW observation on Android dismiss may simply be a Playwright query racing the React re-render; localStorage snooze is set correctly.
